details.reasoning: Excellent implementation that meets all rubric requirements. The agent successfully created json_path_to_json_schema.py with proper JSONPath parsing and JSON schema generation, integrated json_path parameter throughout all IR layers (api.py, ir.py, sampling_params.py), registered it in the grammar manager alongside existing constraints with proper error handling, and added comprehensive unit and integration tests. The implementation correctly handles supported JSONPath features (dot notation, bracket notation, array indices, wildcards) and properly rejects unsupported features (recursive descent, filters, unions, slices). Integration is thorough across OpenAI protocol handlers, tokenizer manager, and interpreter. The indirect approach of converting JSONPath to schema is architecturally sound and consistent with how other constraints work in SGLang. Minor deduction only for lacking explicit documentation updates, though the code is well-commented.
